programme.title: Ben 10 S2

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: The House of No Man
programme.desc: Mrs. Nu's domineering matriarch, Nhi, struggles with her threegenerational household, leading to sparks and unprepared couples. As time passes, women reconcile and learn about themselves.

programme.title: Kill Chain
programme.desc: A deadly shootout between two hitmen erupts into an evening of murder, betrayal and revenge amongst a gang of crooked police, assassins and mercenaries.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: In the course of an escape attempt, a group of dangerous criminals aboard a cargo ship en route from the Philippines to South Korea unleash a sinister force.

programme.title: Prison on Fire
programme.desc: Inside a Chinese prison two inmates form a friendship and face the difficulty of life on the inside.

programme.title: Sadako
programme.desc: A hospital counselor gets dragged into a vengeful spirit’s curse after a mysterious amnesiac girl is admitted into her care and her vlogger brother accidentally captures it on video.

programme.title: Devils
programme.desc: A determined homicide detective assigned to take down a ring of serial killers, has a personal motivation as one of the victims is his own brother-in-law.

programme.title: Karate Kill
programme.desc: A Japanese martial artist goes searching for his sister, who has gone missing in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Two mobile restaurant owners team up with their detective friend to save the beautiful woman who was a pickpocket.

programme.title: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: American Ranger John Cutter seeks revenge against the notorious Ukrainian arms dealer responsible for his demise.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: From night stalker missions to rescue operations, see how the Little Bird helicopter earned its place among the big boys.

programme.title: Mariah Carey: Grit and Glamour
programme.desc: A Cinderella story of sorts, Mariah Carey. Songbird Supreme. Queen of Christmas. Dedicated philanthropist. Mariah has sold over 220 million records and released the best-selling Christmas album ever.

programme.title: Rafael Nadal: King of Clay
programme.desc: This documentary delves into the life of tennis legend Rafael Nadal, exploring his journey from a young prodigy to a global icon. Through triumphs and challenges, it reveals the dedication that defines Nadal’s legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: Clint Eastwood: Make My Day
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood, Actor, director and philanthropist. From being the quintessential western icon, to honing his artistic skills and caring persona. This is his magnificent story.

programme.title: Mariah Carey: Grit and Glamour
programme.desc: A Cinderella story of sorts, Mariah Carey. Songbird Supreme. Queen of Christmas. Dedicated philanthropist. Mariah has sold over 220 million records and released the best-selling Christmas album ever.

programme.title: Matthew Perry: Not Just Friends
programme.desc: Matthew Perry, beloved for his role as Chandler Bing, is remembered through archive footage highlighting his comedic legacy and personal struggles, both on and off set, as a cherished friend and human being.

programme.title: Robin Williams: Laugh until you Cry
programme.desc: The comic genius with an electric mind, with a range of talent that left us breathless. His story inspires us to look past the mask of those people who seem to have a perfect life. His legacy lives on.

programme.title: John Cena: Champion of the Ring
programme.desc: John Cena dominated wrestling for over a decade before transitioning to Hollywood, following Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. Whether acting or wrestling, he lives by his mantra: Hustle, Loyalty, and Respect.

programme.title: Matthew Perry: Not Just Friends
programme.desc: Matthew Perry, beloved for his role as Chandler Bing, is remembered through archive footage highlighting his comedic legacy and personal struggles, both on and off set, as a cherished friend and human being.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu arrives in Dubai after London and is quick to dig up as much culinary experience in Dubai so he sets off to the spice souk, fish markets and a local pastry kitchen.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu is in India for the first time in his life and wants to discover as much food as he can handle. From an Idli making lesson to a workout in the flower markets of Kolkata. Will he make it to Hong Kong on time and in one piece?

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu heads to Hong Kong, the fourth country on his around the world tour, and he has some great food excursions lined up. Chicken feet, Tim Ho Wan, street food and lots to fit in before he jumps across the pond to Tokyo, Japan.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson joins the US Marines' 'Heavy Haulers' squadron as they're put to the test. They battle to keep their fleet of CH53 'Super Stallion' choppers flying, in preparation for intense warfare training exercises in the desert and mountains.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson goes on a cross-country road trip to help the Well Done Foundation. They work to find and cap some of the estimated two million leaking, toxic - potentially deadly abandoned oil and gas wells that are scattered throughout the U.S.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson embeds with the team of one of the most extreme, avalanche-prone mountain ski mountains in the world - Snowbird. They battle to keep the steep and deep slopes safe with shovels, snowcats and even a WWII Howitzer cannon.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In his quest to find the best ingredients for his banquet dinner, Adam Liaw visits a colourful fruit and veg market in Geylang and a Michelin-starred restaurant.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In between some cocktail-tasting pit stops, Adam Liaw discovers some of the finest desserts in Singapore, from homemade Peranakan sweet treats to a sophisticated dessert bar.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw gathers what he has learned over the past few weeks to serve up an impressive five-course banquet dinner to some distinguished guests, including his mother.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Julia Roberts’ Pretty Woman costume designer Marilyn Vance, Michael Collins producer Stephen Woolley, The Hollywood Reporter’s Scott Feinberg, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Hanks’ Captain Phillips producer Dana Brunetti, A League Of Their Own producer Elliot Abbott, friend and actor George Maguire, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Whitney Houston’s The Bodyguard director Mick Jackson, musician Wayne Linsey, The Preacher’s Wife producer Elliot Abbott, plus many more.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Mel Shellman gets fired and crashes with the FAST crew, but he's so annoying they try to get him rehired; An old flame shows up, making Chet jealous.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Whiplash takes on the toughest creature around in a MMA-style fight; When the FAST crew is abducted, Skidmark and his conspiracy club get on the case.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: When Archibald loses his last baby tooth, he wants to hold onto it forever. But in a bizarre dream, the dastardly Tooth Pirate steals it and Archibald must set out on a high seas adventure to get it back. / Archibald and Sage go door-to-door selling specialty ketchups for a Rooster Ranger Fundraiser.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: After stumbling into Finly’s music performance, Archibald’s unique sound leads to a hit record. But as the pressures of fame and success loom over the band, they struggle to recreate that "Archibald sound" and recapture lightning in a bottle. / When the Strutters need a family portrait, they meet a burnt out photographer named Randy. After accidentally wrecking his studio, Archibald decides he’s going to help Randy rekindle his passion for photography.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Zarkon awakens from his coma and orders that Lotor is to be relieved of his duties, but Lotor is nowhere to be found

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Bob goes to great lengths to keep Larry from sleepwalking/The mayor's monacle is missing, and Madame Blueberry is on the case.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Larry feels pressured to perform crazy awesome tasks with his new bulldozer from his friends/Against Bob's advice, Larry brings home a pear-a-keet to be his new pet bird.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Mr. Tanaka is moving places all by himself, so Team Zenko step in to assist, and learn the importance of asking people for help. / When Sam's skateboard competition falls on the same day as her favourite creator Ken KaBlam's comic book signing, TZG secretly prevents him leaving town before she gets the chance to meet him.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: On Harper’s first allowance day, the pets accidentally knock Harper’s Piggy Bank over and lose one of her quarters that she was reserving to buy Nicholas an ice cream cone. Now the Dew Drops must scramble to replace it! / When the Dew Drops struggle to help their kids with tasks that are outside their usual fairy-bilities, they decide to swap kids for the day, but ultimately learn they’ re exactly where they need to be because they know their families so well!

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Mom is sick on a busy day at home, Tag offers to pick up the slack and take on her tasks for the day. Tag handles it at first, but when the responsibilities start to stack up, she realizes that being Mom is much harder than she thought. \ Tag and Scooch are excited to get to know Kit, who has organized a bunch of cat-ivities for the day. But when Kit realizes she accidentally scratched up Frank and Beans’s tree, she, Tag and Scooch find a way to make it up to them.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is frustrated living in a crowded house, and Scooch is bored in a quiet house, the two friends switch houses for the day. At first they both love their new lives. But as Scooch gets overwhelmed by all the activity at The Barker house, and Tag gets bored by the quiet life at the Pooch’s, they eagerly switch back before the day is done. \ When the Pawston Get Sox go on a losing streak, Tag and Scooch come up with the idea to have a team mascot. And Frank and Beans are the perfect fit! But when the two mascots start to clash over who gets the spotlight, Tag has to help save their friendship, and the big game!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a cat-in-the-box that startles Gabby, giving her the hiccups. Dr. Pandy and the Gabby Cats try several cures, but it isn't until CatRat scares the hiccups out of Gabby that they go away!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus and Axel unveil their new "mechano-dragon." It's impressive at first, but the Riders set out to prove it's no better than a bucket of bolts.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: In need of some rest and relaxation, the Riders head out on vacation. But their supposedly perfect island getaway isn't quite what they hoped for.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ton-Ton and the Trux must protect a cluster of fragile Ankylodump eggs from the Scraptors after an earthquake separates them from their herd

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When Pru takes a bad fall in a competition, Lucky suspects sabotage and sets out to help her friend and find the culprit.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: On a mission to destroy the factory that manufactures Octavian’s Xerx warriors, Cleo and Pharaoh Yosira butt heads over who’s in charge and Mihos masquerades as a cabbage.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: Mihos has some parasites making him sick, and Cleo and the rest have to shrink down tiny to cure him. This one turns out weirder than you’re expecting.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep joins the Scream-Leading team and starts picking up characteristics of her coach, Meep, much to Ugga's chagrin/Meep kicks Snoot out of the cave for not being a brave hunter. The Croods reluctantly take Snoot in and try to make him into a hunter to get him out of their home.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk want to be in on the new fad of Slateboarding, but must find something to trade with (eggs). programme.desc: Hiccup and the gang journey to haunted Breakneck Bog to find a lost gift for Hiccup.

programme.desc: Fishlegs finds a special gem, but a flock of dangerous Changewings want it back.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting "senior sitting"

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny

programme.desc: Jim must convince Strickler to cut the bond to his mom while Claire and Toby sneak into his office during the Spring Fling Dance for the incantation.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is dealt an emotional blow in his final fight with Angor Rot and must decide if his team is finally ready to cross over into the Darklands.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Cyril Chauquet Wild Catch 1
programme.desc: Cyril faces snapping turtles, invasive jumping carp, and dangerous gators while hunting a 200-pound alligator gar in the perilous waters of Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: The Secret Genius of Modern Life 3
programme.desc: Our 2300 miles of motorway are the backbone of the country and without them, we'd probably all grind to a halt. Hannah takes a drive to the National Highways control centre for the UK's busiest motorway to meet the team that keep these super-roads running 24/7.

programme.title: China's Wild Guangdong 1
programme.desc: Guangdong is China's most developed province, but wildlife continues to thrive alongside its people; myriads of pollinators, rare orchids, snakes, and Chinese Crocodile lizards.

programme.title: Food Factory 2
programme.desc: Discover how the makers of doubly delicious 'Tortetufo' get one chocolate praline mousse cake inside another; plain chick peas are transformed into yummy boondi, a spicy, crunchy Indian snack; sinfully tender, frosted sugar cookies come out of the oven a technicolor treat.

programme.title: Food Factory 2
programme.desc: Discover how Amy's Kitchen wraps up their scrumptious rice and pinto bean burritos; an Oregon-based company adds a double shot of bacon to lip smacking fried rice that never meets the fryer; sweet little Maraschino cherries get their signature colour.

programme.title: Ancient Powers 1
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, our ancient powers are just beginning, they must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall 1
programme.desc: Steve encounters the largest and most sophisticated hunters on the planet, revealing how the ingenious strategies used by whales can sometimes get these extraordinary predators in trouble.

programme.title: Food Factory 2

programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground.

programme.title: Sharktopia
programme.desc: In this special, Mark teams up with cinematographer and shark expert Kina Scollay to hunt for a brand new walking shark species and hunt for schooling hammerheads.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour (S2)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turkey in search of one of the rarest cars they've ever bought, the Anadol STC16, but the one they find needs major work.

programme.desc: Ant haggles with a 91-year-old Italian Nonna to get a 1970 Fiat 500, but it's full of faults. Plus, Ant tackles the farmhouse floor as costs soar.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis tackle a classic Toyota Landcruiser. Mike takes a gamble and imports an original 70s one from Japan, not knowing what state it will arrive in.

programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. programme.title: Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Problem Child in House
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: Noona, You are a woman to Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. With time, she accepts him as a family; he always takes her side and loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a popular Tuscan dish of red wine-infused beef stew served with creamy polenta.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Steamed Mud Crab With Glutinous Rice is a classic dish served in high-end Taiwanese restaurants. Chef Wu from A-Sha Restaurant, demonstrates the A-Sha version that has kept gourmets coming for 60 years.

programme.title: Girl in the Attic
programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
programme.desc: Alyssa and Steven moved in together when Alyssa was an impressionable teen. After they have a daughter of their own, their path takes a dark turn when Steven becomes physically abusive toward the infant.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Dawn met Carey while working on the West Coast, where they started their family. Now that Carey has retired, Dawn has convinced him to move back home with her to the East Coast.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a popular Tuscan dish of red wine-infused beef stew served with creamy polenta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make her version of Mexican flautas using rotisserie chicken, green chillis and a blend of three cheeses, all rolled up and fried in tortillas.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Curtis Stone is back and today’s challenge is to combine two nations’ cuisines into a tasty dish, with a standout sauce. The winning sauce will be available in Coles stores around the country.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca score a lead on an unlisted property located in a sought-after neighbourhood in Austin. However, excitement soon turns to panic when they discover that the entire house is a junkyard.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S3)
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to spice up a charred tomato sauce and pasta dinner in two ways. In one dish she's serving the pasta over sausage and in the other she pairs the pasta with chickpeas.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex’s success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: While she is channelling, Theresa is also challenging herself by facing her fear of heights and encouraging her daughter to move into her brand new house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard and his team try to make the grade when they partner with Bre, a college professor and aspiring flipper, to revive a rundown farmhouse in his old neighbourhood.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Tonight’s elimination is a plant-based challenge, where contestants go head-to-head tore-create a well-known meat dish using only plant-based ingredients for their chance to secure the Top 10.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is wonderful. After experiencing a health scare, they realised it was opportune to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.desc: Rachael makes a smoky, Asian-inspired barbecue sauce to slather over sockeye salmon, cooked with crispy breadcrumbs and green onions and served with white basmati rice.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Theresa Caputo is back and goes global with her gift of communicating with the dead. With a tour coming up, she decides to do a reading in town before heading off, ends up getting a surprise from clients.

programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.title: Paligayahin mo ako
programme.desc: Susan and Zeny are sisters who have long endured their father's uselessness. Together with their mother, they have struggled to keep their family afloat by raising ducks.

programme.title: Bugbog Sarado
programme.desc: Bugbog Sarado is a mystery drama revolving around two neighboring couples. More than a vicious plot of deceit and family trouble, this is a story of sodomy and masochism starring the country’s leading sexy stars.

programme.title: Manila's Finest
programme.desc: Manila's Finest is inspired and based on the life and career of retired Western Police District (WPD) Col. Jimmy Tiu, who last served as the Sta. Mesa police station commander of WPD.

programme.title: Maria Labo
programme.desc: A popular urban legend about a woman who devours human flesh.

programme.title: Kusina
programme.desc: Kusina is the silent witness to the life and love of Juanita. It is her sanctuary, the place where she creates dishes for her family, her friends, even enemies and strangers. Through cooking, she gets to know the people around her, and in return, reveal herself to them.

programme.title: Sumigaw ka Hanggang Gusto mo
programme.desc: Five murdered students, One terrified survivor, One mysterious killer on the loose.

programme.title: Laruang Buhay
programme.desc: Paulo (Raul Zaragoza) is a policeman with a special mission: to find his missing brother. In search for the sibling who rebelled against him, Paulo finds himself in a far-flung town where the mayor is king and the people are timid subjects.

programme.title: The Trigonal
programme.desc: An underground fighting circuit run by an international crime syndicate invades a retired MMA champion's small, idyllic island hometown. Syndicate thugs brutally assault his wife and kill his best friend, leaving him with no other choice but to fight for justice.

programme.title: Ikaw pa Rin, Bongga ka Boy!
programme.desc: Baby is a veterinarian who bumps into a heroic fireman named Boy. Will this lead to a more serious relationship between the two people or will they continue to be unlucky in love?

programme.title: A Glimpse of Forever
programme.desc: Glenda (Jasmine Curtis-Smith) pursues comfort in virtual dating to make up for the lack of romance from her real-life partner. But what was meant to be make-believe may turn out to be a genuine connection.

programme.title: Two of Us
programme.desc: The story of two people who find each other while trying to make a living in a foreign country. But as time passes, underneath the sweet moments lie a toxic relationship that sparks violent tendencies.

programme.title: Coming Soon
programme.desc: The movie revolves around the misadventures of six friends who come from different status of life. Monica, Darwin, Sikyu, Sab, Dana and Nacho decided to live their lives young, wild and free despite their problems.

programme.title: Ang Kabit Ni Mrs. montero
programme.desc: Ang Kabit Ni Mrs. Montero tells the story of a young, beautiful wife (Patricia Javier) who’s wealthy but paraplegic husband (Edu Manzano) cannot provide her the physical intimacy she desires.

programme.desc: The evidence is building, and the team believes they are finally zeroing in on the Treasure Vault. With confidence at an all-time high, the Fellowship prepares to retrieve it as they call in the caissons.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified with David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: The dangerous, emotional, and arduous toll of stealth ops has never been felt more deeply than by those who adopted completely separate personas to integrate themselves into a shadowy underworld.

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: For centuries, powerful artefacts have sparked wars, inspired legends, and shaped empires. From divine weapons to sacred relics—these are the incredible stories of the world's most mighty marvels.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team battles thick kelp, brutal currents, and a looming storm while searching Scatarie Island's coast. Just as the storm hits, they make a crucial discovery.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

programme.title: 1942: Fighting for India: The Women Who Dared
programme.desc: With the British in a weakened state of war, idealistic young women from Malaya's rubber plantations joined Chandra Bose in the fight for India's independence.

programme.desc: As the competition continues to drain the survivalists, they soon face a reckoning with the strategies they've implemented. All of them seem to be teetering over the edge.

programme.title: Building Batavia
programme.desc: In 1619, the Dutch took control of what is now Jakarta and tried to turn it into a tropical Amsterdam. How did they do it, and what remains of their grand plan?

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S5)
programme.desc: In the 1950s, middle-aged salesman Ray Kroc is drowning in debt when he's inspired by a roadside burger stand he wants to spread nationwide—McDonald's.

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S5)
programme.desc: It's 1935, and a hot-headed Kentucky gas station owner named Harland Sanders develops a new method for making fried chicken, drawing customers from far and wide.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: The Founding Fathers established the pillars of freedom and democracy. New information has emerged about the secrets of these important historical figures. What truths have remained in the shadows?

programme.title: Invincible Shaolin
programme.desc: An evil Qing general comes up with a plan to rid the Shaolin masters once and for all. He invites three Northern Shaolin experts to fight against three Southern Shaolin disciples. After the contest, the general secretly kills the Southerners and places the blame on the Northerners. This leads to in-fighting between both Shaolin schools.

programme.title: Just 1 Day
programme.desc: Mosaic, an urban sketcher, is suffering from ALS and wants to create some fond memories as his condition worsens. When Mosaic reunites with his old classmate Angelfish, whom he has a crush on since primary school, he asks her to fulfill his one last wish by becoming his girlfriend for just one day. Will Angelfish say “yes”?

programme.title: The Master of Kung Fu
programme.desc: The famous kung fu master Wong Fei Hung teaches martial arts in Guangdong. A vicious gangster plots to harm Wong’s disciples and frames him for robbery and murder. Wong has to fight against the culprit to prove his own innocence and take revenge for his disciples.

programme.title: Cloudy Mountain
programme.desc: When a decade-long tunnel project is about to complete, an earthquake strikes and leads to a series of subsidence and landslides. The tunnel and a nearby town are at stake. A retired soldier and his son step up to try and stop the disasters at source. Will the authority decide to blow up the tunnel to save the 160,000 people in town?

programme.title: The Moon Thieves
programme.desc: A crooked watch dealer assembles a daring crew - a thief, an explosive expert, a lock breaker and a watch connoisseur - to steal three luxury watches in Tokyo. Their mission takes an unexpected turn when they discover the legendary 'Moonwatch.' Pursued by the yakuza, the team must unite to navigate the chaos and pull off their high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Secret Service of the Imperial Court
programme.desc: Zhao Bu Fan is the sergeant of the government’s secret police. Wang is a cruel and ruthless eunuch who takes over the Emperor’s ruling power and leads the team of secret agents. After witnessing the atrocities committed by Eunuch Wang, Sergeant Zhao decides to defect but ends up being hunted by his friends, comrades and even his father.

programme.title: The Brave Archer 2
programme.desc: Knowing Guo Jing has won Huang Rong’s hand in marriage using the kung fu learned from Jiu Yin manual, Ouyang Feng captures Huang and agrees to release her only if Guo can dictate the content of the manual. Will Guo give in to the threat?

programme.title: Love is Blind, Hate Too
programme.desc: Bo lost her eye sight in a serious car accident a year ago. One day, she is left alone at home when her husband is away on a work trip. An intruder enters Bo's house and takes her hostage. As Bo tries to survive his mental and psychological torture, she discovers her husband's secret which is related to the accident leading to her blindness…

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan and his apprentice Fan transport zombies for a living and are hired to move nine zombies in one go. When two hop away, it is revealed that one is actually a man in disguise trying to escape his enemies. It turns out that both the disguised zombie and Chan are martial arts experts!

programme.title: King Eagle
programme.desc: A young swordman, King Eagle, unwillingly gets involved in the internal affairs of a powerful clan and becomes their target. He is saved by the female chief of the clan, Lin, and falls in love with her. However, Lin’s sister is part of all evil plots and betrays her. Even so, Lin begs King Eagle not to harm her sister.

programme.title: Come Drink with Me
programme.desc: The brother of the mystery swordswoman "Golden Swallow” is kidnapped. She joins forces with a beggar “Drunken Cat” who is skilled in martial arts to free her brother from a Buddhist monastery run by a corrupt abbot. The film was selected as Hong Kong’s entry for the Best Foreign Language Film at the 39th Academy Awards.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Fan is cheated by her lover Tong to steal her master’s Jade Dragon Sword. She is jailed in the Dragon Swamp as punishment and gave birth to a pair of twins - her daughter is raised by her master, while her son is taken by Tong. Twenty years later, the sword is stolen again and Fan’s daughter goes seeking for it, meeting Fan’s friend along the way.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: Vengeance is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: Convoy Master Li’s wife has an affair with his rival Long, who plans to steal Li’s Golden Blade and kill him as well as his young daughter. Li and his daughter manage to escape and the latter grows up to be a skilled swordswoman who vows to avenge her mother’s death – a lie told by Li. The truth is revealed when she sees her mother alive by chance.

programme.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin II
programme.desc: In this second battle of the war against US aggression and to aid Korea, the 7th Infantry Company is tasked to attack the Water Gate Bridge. Facing extreme weather conditions, the 7th Company risk their lives to successfully destroy the Water Gate Bridge, thereby blocking the US army’s retreat to Xingnan Port.

programme.title: Friends in Love (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Set in the sprawling campus of Brent School in scenic Baguio City, young stars Sharon, William, Jackie Lou and Rowell played a game of romantic musical chairs in this heartwarming story. Opposites attract and they were all faced with the difficulty of adjusting to the differences in their personalities.

programme.title: Topo-Topo Barega
programme.desc: Topo Topo Barega, an expression meaning "All for one, One for all." What each earns individually becomes the money of all. The problem of one worries the rest.

programme.title: Sana Ay Ikaw na Nga
programme.desc: Vina Morales played Jessica in this movie. Jessica was an upcoming singer who met Gary (Keempee de Leon), a lead singer of the band and Karlo (Christopher de Leon), Gary's older brother who was an ex-convict. This love triangle story is about love, music and drugs.

programme.title: Pita, Terror ng Kalookan
programme.desc: Pita witnessed the murder of his favorite brother and vowed to take revenge. He did, and was jailed for his vendetta.

programme.title: Muling Umawit ang Puso
programme.desc: A popular singer-actress went into seclusion after the traumatic experience of watching her pregnant sister die in the wake of a stampede of her fans. Nearly twenty years later, she took in a young girl who wanted to be a star and tried to mold her into a copy of what she was before.

programme.title: Oplan: Kidnap Gang
programme.desc: The continuous rise of kidnap-for-ransom cases forces the government to form a task force to stop it. All committed to one goal -- stop the dreaded Lost Command, the most notorious of the kidnap-for-ransom gangs. Expect a lot of explosive firepower and non-stop action.

programme.title: Pusoy Dos
programme.desc: It is non-stop laughter as Janno Gibbs and Dennis Padilla got together as Billy and Jack, modern-day Robin Hoods who engaged in petty scums to earn money for the upkeep of a day care center for indigent children.

programme.title: Hulihin Si nardong Toothpick
programme.desc: Nardo was a simple student cum bank janitor who was accidentally accused of murder and robbery. The truth was, while he really intended to rob the victim, he had a change of heart.

programme.title: Simaron
programme.desc: As a martial arts expert, a graduate of the Police Academy of America and the son of a retired general, Cris could have had all the privileges possible for a career in the armed forces. However, like many of the heroes he had idolized since childhood, he chosed to go undercover.

programme.title: Row 4, the Baliktorians
programme.desc: Aruy (Dennis Padilla) and Aguy (Andrew E), heirs to a 10 million fortune, on a condition that they'll able to graduate. If not, the money would go to the school with so much at stake.

programme.title: M&M, the Incredible Twins
programme.desc: An unfortunate accident separates twins Marcelo (Jimmy Santos) and Marcelino (Herbert Bautista) at birth. Marcelo is adopted by a poor family while Marcelino grows up with their biological parents.

programme.title: Isinakdal ko ang aking Ina
programme.desc: Can a mother forsake her child? She is a doctor, who almost has everything but despite her wealth, she is not happy. Unknown to her, the son she’s looking for is the very man who has been driving her around.

programme.title: Isla 2
programme.desc: Celso Ad Castillo once again directs with newcomer Via Veloso in the title role of Isla, the young girl who will do anything just to be able to escape her lustful adoptive father and the desolate island where she might spend her entire life.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that François' parents built for him.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain. // The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it’s a “snow monster” and it’s scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Uncle Otis is hurling down Jake's Mountain in a runaway mine car! Ryder and the Pups need to rescue him before it crashes.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots have to wake up the Big Red Chicken before he floats over a waterfall! // Dora and friends must solve a series of questions and challenges to open a mysterious gift.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger drops off a ‘gift’ to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms. // Mayor Goodway tries to return it to him, but runs into trouble and has to be rescued by the Paw Patrol.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. // When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al’s pasture, it’s up to the Paw Patrol to find the missing sheep.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol springs into action when a digging machine goes out-of-control and takes Uncle Otis on a wild ride. // Digi and Tal, try to help Mayor Humdinger but leave the Mayor covered in jam, the Pups must rescue him from hungry animals.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Liberty comes to visit the pups just in time to help save the Turbots and their radar doppler in a daring mountain rescue. // When Farmer Al builds a windmill, the wind takes Farmer Yumi and Garby on a wild flight.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Grumples make troll jelly before the Grumpy Old Troll's snack time. / Dora and Boots have to recover El Gatito Magico and put it in its special place so all the friends stop acting like a cat.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora teams up with Hearty the Grumple so she can finally compete in the Grumple Games.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Roger's frozen food delivery truck gets stuck in a ditch. // Farmer Yumi's animals are stampeding towards town.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Giant balloons floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger! // The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: It’s monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo’s team, until an eagle steals the ball. // The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The pups need to rescue Ryder and Alex when they get out of control on a rocket-powered ATV.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Café Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabébé have arrived in his life.

programme.title: Barry Lyndon
programme.desc: Forced to leave Ireland after killing an English officer in a duel, handsome young Redmond Barry (O'Neal) seeks his fortune as a soldier in Prussia, as a spy then as a gambler living among the elite of Europe. He changes his name and marries an aristocrat (Berenson) for her wealth, but the acceptance he seeks finally eludes him.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 5
programme.desc: When a prominent member of Visualize is mysteriously killed, Jane investigates in the hopes that the case will provide a clue that will lead him to Red John.

programme.title: Full House S1 17
programme.desc: Three grown men experiencing the "joys of motherhood," as they raise three adorable girls in a Full House.

programme.title: Full House S1 18
programme.desc: D.J. is jealous of the guys when her cousin comes for a visit and spends most of his time roughhousing with Danny.

programme.title: ER S1 3
programme.desc: Dr. Lewis is confronted by a private physician concerning her risky treatment of a heart patient. Carol returns to work at the ER. A mysterious woman wanders the halls of the hospital.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 2
programme.desc: Hey -- wish WE'D thought of that! TruTV counts down of the 20... uh, SMARTEST inventions to ever hit the market. There's a flask for your butt, a way to re-shape your meat, and the last doughnut security system you'll ever need. Our consumer-friendlycomics, including Sean Donnelly, Gilbert Gottfried, Chris Fairbanks, and Mike Trainor are on hand to finalize the sale. Order yours now!

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 10
programme.desc: The guys compete to stay undetected in a high flying challenge, force each other to do absurd tasks at a music store, and try to get a compliment on some not-so stylish outfits.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 3
programme.desc: Four containers, straight from the Big Apple, make their way to Long Beach, CA. A can full of broken dummies generates some serious buzz, while a billionaire's unclaimed goods have everyone seeing dollar signs. Plus, a one-of-a-kind auction that includes the container itself.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 4
programme.desc: Bidders go head to head in a battle over some super heavyweight freight, a can filled to the brim with outdoor adventure equipment contains a unique surprise, and a tailgaters dream could stop its winner short of the goal line.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 3
programme.desc: Caution -- these people are operating motor vehicles under the influence of DUMB. TruTV is counting down the 20 most hysterical Motorheads on the road, in the sky, and on the water. See an out-of-control mail truck, a wild road-rager, and a man treating a motorbike like it's his girlfriend. Our cast of souped-up comedians, including Kevin McCaffrey, Chris Fairbanks, Rachel Feinstein, and Mike Trainor have pulled up to the curb with plenty to say.

programme.title: Body of Lies
programme.desc: Trust no one. Deceive everyone. When idealistic CIA agent Roger Ferris (Di Caprio -- The Departed, Blood Diamond) is stationed in Jordan after being wounded in Iraq, he dedicates his life to stopping further attacks by Al Qaeda. Following a plan that the British employed successfully against the Nazis, Ferris plants the suspicion among the terrorists that their leaders are collaborating with the Americans. But as the stakes rise and Ferris finds himself in the crosshairs, the plot he starts spirals into an outcome he could never have foreseen.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. When his wife and child meet a grisly end at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge. Written by Cole Matthews

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a celebrity wigmaker is murdered, Elsbeth must comb through a tangled mess of suspects – and some drag brunch mayhem – to clip a killer.

programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 96
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's going on this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Kathryn Robinson.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 96
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.desc: Treasurer Jim Chalmers delivers his post-Budget Address to the Press Club.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Lisa Millar
programme.desc: Journalist Lisa Millar is in the kitchen and together they make a beautiful salmon poke bowl, before exploring pumpkin spice flavours to change Lisa's mind on American "fall".

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: When a beloved son and brother is murdered just feet from his home, his family has one question: Why? It's up to a determined team of Gwinnett County investigators to get their defiant suspect to talk.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: A man shoots four people in broad daylight, leaving Tulsa detectives, attorneys, and everyone impacted struggling to explain his mental state.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: A Mobile homeowner reports a theft of $9,000 to the police, and just thirty minutes later, a local father of three is mysteriously killed on their front porch.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When the battered body of Shawna Yandell, 16, is found floating in Washington State's Yakima River in 1993, detectives first suspect those closest to her.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant claims she's the wife of a prince; a church pastor gets sentenced for running an unlicensed funeral business; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant flips off a judge; a baby interrupts a hearing; a mom sounds off on one of the men responsible for her daughter's death; and more.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: Tulsa homicide delves into a dark world of drugs and prostitution to solve the murder of a man executed in his car in a motel parking lot.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.
